treatment_information.specific_treatment: anterior glossectomy, bilateral neck dissection I-IV, free flap reconstruction, skin graft
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: s/p trach, anterior glossectomy with base of tongue preserved
treatment_information.treatment_response: Stable post-operative status with good capillary refill and intact flap blood supply.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with facial pain and a lesion on the tongue.
Diagnosis of invasive squamous cell carcinoma confirmed by biopsy.
Surgical procedures performed including glossectomy and reconstruction.
Post-operative care initiated with pain management and dietary instructions.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Surveillance recommended with follow-up in 6 months.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Mental status clear and coherent; able to interact.
